title: Just Enough Breeding (JEBr)
description: JEI/REI/EMI plugin that displays breeding information
body:
**Just Enough Breeding (JEBr)** is a [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)/[REI](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei)/[EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi) plugin that displays useful breeding information for various mobs.

##### **Features**

This mod adds extra JEI/REI/EMI categories that provides the following information:

- Shows the items mobs need to breed.
- Displays the spawn egg of the mob for easy lookup.
- Shows the number of eggs produced if the mob lays eggs after breeding.
- If the mob needs to be tamed before breeding, their name will have "(tamed)" added to it.

![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9Pk89J3g/images/d5b16b34ad66f578808627a090a38dabb81f9f5e.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9Pk89J3g/images/d5b16b34ad66f578808627a090a38dabb81f9f5e.png)

##### **Integrations**

Want to integrate your mod with Just Enough Breeding (or the other way around)? The [wiki](https://github.com/Christofmeg/JustEnoughBreeding/wiki) has everything you need.
